mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 240 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank tightening expectations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as bond yields rise and equity valuations contract.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 240 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and payrolls (PAYEMS) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through improved corporate earnings prospects.
failure_condition: The joint growth of INDPRO and PAYEMS fails to produce positive 20d returns in >70% of cases, or their correlation drops below 0.4 in rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A labor market overheating regime, defined by UNRATE below 4% and PAYEMS growth above 150k, generates inflationary pressures that force monetary policy tightening, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in >50% of instances where both UNRATE < 4% and PAYEMS >150k are simultaneously true.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) indicate strong demand for residential construction, boosting related sectors and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through short-term sectoral momentum.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in >60% of instances where HOUST increases by >5% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in real estate finance (RSAFS) reflects reduced consumer and business spending, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as demand-side liquidity dries up.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in >50% of instances where RSAFS declines by >10% quarter-over-quarter.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production (INDPRO) signals weakening supply chain capacity, creating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as corporate earnings face downward pressure.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in >50% of instances where INDPRO declines by >2% month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: A dovish FEDFUNDS trajectory combined with rising CPIAUCSL indicates central bank inaction against inflation, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as real rates decline and risk assets face sell-offs.
failure_condition: The joint condition of FEDFUNDS <1% and CPIAUCSL >240 fails to produce negative 20d returns in >70% of cases, or their correlation drops below -0.3 in rolling windows.
